compiled_state.title: RED — Write structural validation tests for preplanning story-level research
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create `tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh` following the pattern of `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh`.

**Files to create/edit**: (1) `tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh` (create), (2) `.test-index` (edit — append new test to existing preplanning/SKILL.md entry + add RED marker)

**IMPORTANT: Section-scoped assertions.** All Phase 3.5 assertions must be scoped to the section between the Phase 3.5 heading and the next `## Phase` heading. Use `sed -n` to extract the section, then grep within the extracted text. This prevents false positives from Phase 2.25 (which already references WebSearch/WebFetch).

Test sections:
- `test_phase_heading`: SKILL.md contains story-level research phase heading matching `^## Phase 3.5` or equivalent
- `test_trigger_conditions`: Within Phase 3.5 section, documents trigger conditions (undocumented API, assumed data formats, low agent confidence)
- `test_websearch_reference`: Within Phase 3.5 section, references WebSearch or WebFetch (NOT matching Phase 2.25)
- `test_research_notes_structure`: Within Phase 3.5 section, references Research Notes with at least 2 of 4 field names (trigger condition name, query summary, source URLs, key insight)
- `test_graceful_degradation`: Within Phase 3.5 section, includes graceful degradation language

**Bidirectional coverage note**: Existing `test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh` tests Phase 2.5 — unrelated. No modify-existing-test needed.

**TDD Requirement**: This IS the RED test. It fails because no Phase 3.5 exists in SKILL.md yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh
- [ ] Test passes bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) when run
  Verify: ! bash tests/skills/test-preplanning-story-research.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry updated for preplanning SKILL.md with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'preplanning/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test-preplanning-story-research'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: RED confirmed — all 5 tests fail as expected (exit 1) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified: file executable, bash -n passes, test is RED (exit 1), .test-index entry updated with RED marker [test_phase_heading], ruff passes
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
